V4.label: V4 IRB global-only loose (strict not supported on IRB)
V4.precreate_log:

NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces irb99 admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# commit
NOTICE: commit action is not applicable. no configuration changes were made
NCP3-nog(cfg)# end
NCP3-nog#
V4.cfg_log:

NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces irb99 urpf admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces irb99 urpf mode loose
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces irb99 urpf allow-default disabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# commit
ERROR: Failed to perform commit, another commit is in progress.
NCP3-nog(cfg)# rollback 0
NCP3-nog(cfg)# end
NCP3-nog#
V4.cfg_show:
show config interfaces irb99 urpf | no-more

# NCP3-nog config-start [20-Apr-2026 00:08:41 UTC]

interfaces
  irb99
    urpf
      admin-state enabled
      allow-default disabled
      mode loose
    !
  !
!

# NCP3-nog config-end
